scripts.tauri:dev: sh -c 'set -a; [ -f ../../.env.local ] && . ../../${ENV_FILE:-.env.local}; set +a; SIDECAR_URL=$(portless get api.matrix) exec tauri dev --config "{\"build\":{\"devUrl\":\"$(portless get matrix)\"}}"'

dev.command: sh -c 'set -a; [ -f ../../.env.local ] && . ../../${ENV_FILE:-.env.local}; set +a; exec portless run --name ${MATRIX_CLIENT_PORTLESS_NAME:-matrix} -- vite'

dev:mac.command: sh -c 'set -a; [ -f ../../.env.local ] && . ../../${ENV_FILE:-.env.local}; set +a; SKIP_SIDECAR=true SIDECAR_URL=$(portless get ${MATRIX_PORTLESS_NAME:-api.matrix}) exec tauri dev --config "{\"build\":{\"devUrl\":\"$(portless get ${MATRIX_CLIENT_PORTLESS_NAME:-matrix})\"},\"bundle\":{\"externalBin\":[]}}"'

dev:ios.command: sh -c 'set -a; [ -f ../../.env.local ] && . ../../${ENV_FILE:-.env.local}; set +a; SKIP_SIDECAR=true SIDECAR_URL=$(portless get ${MATRIX_PORTLESS_NAME:-api.matrix}) VITE_MATRIX_URL=$(portless get ${MATRIX_PORTLESS_NAME:-api.matrix}) exec tauri ios dev "${IOS_SIMULATOR:-iPhone 17 Pro}" --config "{\"build\":{\"devUrl\":\"$(portless get ${MATRIX_CLIENT_PORTLESS_NAME:-matrix})\"},\"bundle\":{\"externalBin\":[]}}"'
